form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months favourite; won by 0.5 len Senonnes-Pouanc? on March 13 over 3600m on heavy track defeating Mentalo De Grez with 67kg at $3 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished third of 12 runners at Moulins on December 13 over 3500m, 5 len behind Kiwanuka Du Mathan carrying 66kg. Top chance, with upside.
